title: DDP training hang due to kernel version
summary: sparse_memory_concat_fusion_v1_fixed training repeatedly hangs at step 4010-4014. Kernel 5.4.241 < 5.5.0 recommended minimum for PyTorch DDP. 6 recovery attempts failed, 80% progress (4000/5000) stuck. Experiment abandoned.
root_cause: Kernel version 5.4.241 < 5.5.0 recommended minimum for PyTorch DDP. Training hung at step 4014 after 6 recovery attempts.
fix_applied: 2026-04-23 04:03 - Killed hung process, abandoned experiment. Decision to pivot to KV cache compression methods.
validation_result: 2026-04-23 04:15 - Issue recorded, pivot decision documented in UPDATELOG.md and RESEARCH_REPORT.md.

title: Selective Context token pruning causes severe PPL degradation
summary: Evaluated Selective Context with OPT-125m toy model. Medium context: PPL 2.90 → 18.01 (+521%). Long context: PPL 1.73 → 92.35 (+5236%). Importance-based compression preserves only beginning/end tokens, losing critical context. Approach abandoned.
root_cause: Token-level deletion disrupts sequence structure, causing poor predictions. Simple heuristics (preserve first/last 10%) lose too much context for long sequences.
fix_applied: 2026-04-23 04:15 - Documented findings, decided to pivot to KV cache compression methods.
validation_result: 2026-04-23 04:15 - Results recorded in RESEARCH_REPORT.md. Pivot to KV cache compression documented.
